title: nie-bot: BotConfig unit tests
description:
What: Unit test suite for BotConfig TOML parsing and env override logic.

Algorithm:
1. In bot/src/config.rs #[cfg(test)] module:
   - test_full_toml_parse: parse TOML with all fields set, assert each field
   - test_empty_toml_returns_defaults: parse empty string, assert relay=ws://127.0.0.1:3210/ws
   - test_env_relay_overrides_file: set env RELAY=wss://test.example.com/ws, load config, assert relay
   - test_invalid_relay_scheme_returns_err: relay="ftp://bad", assert Err(BotError::Config(_))
   - test_missing_keyfile_uses_default: no keyfile in TOML, assert keyfile = data_dir/identity.key

Defensive: use temp dirs for config paths; unset env vars after each test (use serial test or std::env guards).

Agent team: T (tester — derives expected values from TOML spec, not from BotConfig code).
Tests: oracle is the TOML spec and the algorithm above. Expected values are hardcoded constants.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-bot bot::config passes; all 5 test cases present and passing
